textPlain: Because the AI works so well, or because it doesn't?> ”By reducing the size of our team, fewer conversations will be required to make a decision, and each person will be more load-bearing and have more scope and impact,” Wang writes in a memo seen by Axios.That's kinda wild. I'm kinda shocked they put it in writing.
Sadly, the only people who would be surprised reading a statement like this would be anyone who is not ex-fb/meta
It's literally like something out of Silicon Valley (the show).
